title: Orelorn
description: A short but sweet modpack that takes your eyes down the mines!
body:
Orelorn is a Forge-based modpack that is mostly focused on mods that are underground. The biggest one would be Spelunkery, but Oreganized, Copperative, and Create also play a part. The mod is relatively small compared to other packs, and it includes Embeddium, so most computers should be able to run it. Oculus is also included, so bring your favorite shaders if you want, though some are included. SOME VANILLA RECIPIES AND FEATURES ARE CHANGED! MAKE SURE TO MAKE USE OF REI!

You SHOULD be able to run the pack with a low amount of RAM allocated, but I would recommend more, especially if you are using shaders.

If you have any critiques, DM me on Discord @mrhoot2000.
